tagline: Launch-ready resources for Partners, operators, and referral relationships.
description: A lightweight static resource hub for Partner onboarding, launch kits, referral assets, scripts, trackers, prompts, and compliance-safe funding language.
oneLinePositioning: Partner Enablement OS helps Partners launch faster, explain funding responsibly, start better conversations, and use reusable assets without hunting through scattered folders.
ecosystemRole: Moonshine Capital is the ecosystem brand behind this Partner resource layer.
complianceDisclaimer: Funding options, approvals, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed. Provider criteria apply and available options depend on the business profile.
approvedFundingLanguage: approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed

seo.title: Partner Enablement OS | Moonshine Capital
seo.description: A polished resource hub for Partner onboarding, launch kits, referral assets, scripts, trackers, prompts, and compliance-safe funding conversations.

sourceOfTruth.github: GitHub remains the canonical source for static site files and markdown assets.
sourceOfTruth.googleDrive: Google Drive is used for exported and shareable assets.
sourceOfTruth.notion: Notion is used for dashboard and status tracking.
sourceOfTruth.openAIPlatform: OpenAI Platform may be used later for API-enabled features, agents, secure key setup, and automation workflows.
